violations.text: The floor and wall junctures in a portion of the toilet room do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025
The entry to the back area is in poor repair, with an edge piece and one missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025
